description_long: This is a compact, rectangular wooden cabinet with a dark brown top and base, contrasted by lighter-colored side panels and a single front drawer. The drawer features a metallic handle in the center, suggesting it can be pulled open for storage. Below the drawer, there is an open shelf space, providing additional storage or display area. The back and sides are solid, with the rear panel appearing to be a single, unbroken piece. The overall design is simple and functional, with clean lines and a modern aesthetic. The materials and construction suggest it is suitable for indoor use, such as in a garage, office, or urban apartment.
description: A small, modern wooden cabinet with a dark brown top, light sides, a single front drawer with a metallic handle, and an open lower shelf.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark top, light sides, single drawer with a metallic handle, and open lower shelf.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid light-colored panel and the thickness of the dark top.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, solid back panel with a vertical seam down the center.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid light-colored panel and dark top.
